response.step_by_step_log: The video content is a skit/dialogue between four virtual characters. They are discussing and attempting to perform an 'ASMR' segment they label 'Ai no Sasayaki' (Whispers of Love). It is not a musical song. I searched for 'Ai no Sasayaki' to confirm if it was a song title, but the results confirm it is a general phrase often used in ASMR context. Therefore, no song title, original artist, or lyrics are appropriate. The 'performance' is entirely improvised dialogue by the VTubers.
response.global_summary: The video shows four virtual streamers discussing and performing an 'ASMR' segment where they whisper 'Ai no Sasayaki' (Whispers of Love). The audio and video contain comedic, non-professional attempts at performing ASMR, followed by laughter and dialogue. No professional studio music track is playing. The 'lyrics' are improvised by the performers as part of the skit.

scenes.description: Performers start an 'ASMR' skit, whispering the phrase 'Ai no Sasayaki'. This is an improvised performance within the context of the skit, not a song.
Performers continue the skit, whispering 'Ai no Sasayaki' to each other, followed by laughter. No actual song playing, it's a conversational skit.
